function.name: list_camera_configs
function.description: List saved property camera configs. Passwords are never returned.

include_disabled.description: Whether to include disabled camera configs.

function.name: get_camera_config
function.description: Get one saved property camera config by camera_id. Password is never returned.

function.name: upsert_camera_config
function.description: Create or update a property camera config for find_person. Use this to save IP address, username, password, RTSP path, or local test footage paths. Password can be updated but is never returned.

camera_id.description: Stable camera ID, such as gate_01.

password.description: Camera login password to save or update.

recording_source.description: Source type, such as rtsp, onvif, or local.

rtsp_path.description: RTSP path after host:port, such as Streaming/Channels/101.

playback_uri.description: Playback URI from NVR/camera if known.

onvif_port.description: ONVIF device service port, such as 2020 for discovered Tapo cameras.

nvr_host.description: NVR IP/host for recorded playback, such as 10.0.0.70.

nvr_port.description: NVR RTSP port for playback, usually 554.

nvr_password.description: NVR password for recorded playback. It is saved but never returned.

nvr_channel.description: NVR channel number for this camera.

nvr_stream.description: NVR stream number for playback, usually 1.

local_path.description: Local exported video path, preferably relative to internal/.

allow_rtsp_fallback.description: Whether find_person may build/use an RTSP URL from IP credentials.

enabled.description: Whether this camera should be used by default.

function.name: delete_camera_config
function.description: Delete one saved property camera config by camera_id.

function.name: find_person
function.description: Find and group people in property CCTV footage over a time range. Uses saved enabled camera configs by default, or accepts camera sources with camera_id, local_path/video_path, or rtsp_url, saves detected person crops, keeps same-day identities stable, and returns relative image paths for chat preview.

camera_sources.description: Camera source objects for the property footage.

local_path.description: Path to an exported local video, preferably relative to internal/.

output_dir.description: Directory under internal/ for output media.
